description_long: This sculpture depicts a seated male figure, partially draped, with one arm resting on his knee and the other hand holding a staff or rod. At his feet sits a dog, gazing up at him, both figures rendered in a classical style. The sculpture is mounted on a tall, cylindrical black marble pedestal with white veining, which stands on a circular wooden platform. The male figure appears to be carved from a pale, marble-like material, contrasting with the darker pedestal. The overall composition suggests a moment of calm interaction between the man and the dog. The craftsmanship is detailed, with careful attention to anatomical features and drapery folds.
description: A classical-style marble sculpture of a seated man with a dog at his feet, mounted on a tall black marble pedestal atop a circular wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, his hand resting on his knee, and the dog looking up at him; the pedestal and wooden base are fully visible.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing the man's back, the dog's back, and the drapery falling behind the figure; the pedestal's veining is also visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the profile of the man and dog, with the man's arm and staff more prominent; the pedestal's cylindrical shape is clear.
description_view_3: Angled front view showing the man's chest, the dog's attentive posture, and the detailed folds of the drapery; the pedestal and base are also visible.
attribute_subject_matter: seated male figure with a dog
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is displayed on a wooden platform, suggesting an indoor or formal exhibition setting.
